'''Ord Segra spaceport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Segra]]. [[Pilot/Legends|Pilots]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] often met there and [[Gambling/Legends|gambled]].

==Appearances==
